rationale: The citing paper is a multichannel online conversion-attribution modeling study, while the cited paper focuses on customer-initiated manufacturer contacts, fairness, satisfaction, SCR, and WoM in CPGs, so direct methodological or empirical dependence is not evident from the notes. However, the citing constructs do include “customer-initiated” vs. “firm-initiated” channels, so the 2001 paper could be a conceptual source; with only a bare DOI match and no in-text citation context, this cannot be safely dropped.
